name: adult small bites chicken & barley recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet small bites adult dry dog food is specially formulated to fuel the energy needs of dogs during the prime of their life. delicious chicken & barley recipe made with high quality, easy-to-digest ingredients in a small bite size. contains activbiome+ multi-benefit, a special blend of prebiotic fibers and antioxidants to support digestion, immune system and organ health healthy skin & coat with omega-6 & vitamin e lean muscles supported with high-quality protein
